zh.lifeSummary: 當John Strong   I於大約1520年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親Robert Strong31歲，母親Agness Boyngton32歲。他於1540年與Agnes Whitman在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1580年11月29日在英國薩默塞特梅爾斯享年61歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特梅爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Strong   I于大约1520年出生在英国薩默塞特时，他的父亲Robert Strong31岁，母亲Agness Boyngton32岁。他于1540年与Agnes Whitman在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1580年11月29日在英国薩默塞特梅爾斯享年61岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特梅爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Strong
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English strong(e), strang(e) ‘strong, powerful’ (Old English strang).
Americanized form (translation into English) of Jewish   Stark  .

variants.name: Strang
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German stranc ‘strip of land’, or a habitational name from any of the places so called.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a rope maker, from Middle High German stranc, German Strang ‘cord, rope’.

variants.name: Trehan
meanings: Indian: Sikh name, from a name of a sub-caste of Khatris.

Channel Islands (Jersey): occupational name, a variant of French Trahand, from a derivative of French traire ‘to draw or stretch’, for a silk worker whose job was to draw out the thread from cocoons. In Britain it has sometimes been ‘translated’ into English as Strong .

variants.name: Trahan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Monique, Pierre, Leonce, Lucien, Alcide, Cecile, Emile, Adrien, Camille.

French: variant of Trahant or Trahand (and, in North America, an altered form of the former), a metonymic occupational name for a silkworker who drew out the thread from the cocoons, from a derivative of the verb traire ‘to draw or stretch’. Compare Strong .

History: The LA branches of the Trahan family trace their descent from Guillaume Trahan, from Montreuil-Bellay in Maine-et-Loire, who arrived in Acadia in the 17th century; he married Madeleine Brun in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada), c. 1666. At the time of the expulsion of the Acadians (1755–64), his numerous descendants were deported and finally settled principally in the Attakapas country of LA.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Strong   I was born about 1520, in Somerset, England, his father, Robert Strong, was 31 and his mother, Agness Boyngton, was 32. He married Agnes Whitman in 1540, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 29 November 1580, in Mells, Somerset, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Mells, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Strong   I est né environ 1520, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Robert Strong, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agness Boyngton, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Whitman en 1540, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 29 novembre 1580, à Mells, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Mells, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Strong   I um 1520 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Strong 31 und seine Mutter Agness Boyngton 32. Er hat 1540 in Somerset, England Agnes Whitman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 29. November 1580 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Mells, Somerset, England und wurde in Mells, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Strong   I è nato il circa 1520 nel Somerset, England, il suo padre, Robert Strong, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Agness Boyngton, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Whitman nel 1540, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 29 novembre 1580, nel Mells, Somerset, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Mells, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Strong   Iが約1520年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Robert Strongは31歳，母Agness Boyngtonは32歳であった。1540年にイギリスソメルセトでAgnes Whitmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1580年11月29日にイギリスソメルセトメルズで61歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトメルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Strong   I(이)가 대략 1520년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Strong(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Agness Boyngton(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1540년 영국 서머세트에서 Agnes Whitman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1580년 11월 29일 영국 서머세트 멜스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 멜스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Strong   I nasceu aproximadamente 1520, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Strong, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agness Boyngton, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Whitman em 1540, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de novembro de 1580, em Mells, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Mells, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Strong   I родился около 1520 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Strong было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agness Boyngton, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Whitman в 1540 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 29 ноября 1580 г. в местности меллс, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности меллс, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Strong   I nació aproximadamente 1520, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Strong, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Agness Boyngton, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Agnes Whitman en 1540, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 29 de noviembre de 1580, en Mells, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Mells, Somerset, Inglaterra.
